summary: Updated Close Conversation.prompt.md (v5.1 → v5.2) with full v2 build orchestration support: pre-decided title from thread_title, structured completion via update_build.py, learnings/concerns fields, and orchestrator close workflow.
learnings: The existing prompt had good structure - v2 changes fit naturally as extensions. Detection priority order matters: v2 fields first, then legacy. Pre-decided title is elegant - removes semantic ambiguity from workers.
